final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing UI mockup for an e-commerce landing page hero section for LUMEA BEAUTY.

Style/medium: clean, bright, airy, feminine, floral accents with purple flowers
Composition: hero section with left column for text, center subject with model, right column for product display and stat cards
Subject: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum
Scene/backdrop: e-commerce landing page hero section with soft pink and white color palette
Lighting/mood: soft lighting
Color palette: soft pink and white
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: pill-shaped feature badges, pink checkmarks for bullet points, floating white rounded rectangles with gold accents for stat cards, horizontal white rounded rectangles with icons for benefit cards
Avoid:
